({RAWSTMT :stmt_location 0 :stmt_len 124
  :stmt {SELECT
    :targets ({TARGET :expr {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 8} :property "name" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 13} :loc_start 7 :loc_end 13} {TARGET :expr {FUNCCALL :name "ST_DISTANCE" :args ({DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 27 :loc_end 28} :property "location" :loc_start 27 :loc_end 37} {CREATEOBJECT :fields ({FIELD :key "type" :value {STRLIT :val "Point" :loc_start 48 :loc_end 53} :loc_start 40 :loc_end 53} {FIELD :key "coordinates" :value {CREATEARRAY :elements ({NUMLIT :val "55.2708" :loc_start 73 :loc_end 80} {NUMLIT :val "25.2048" :loc_start 82 :loc_end 89}) :loc_start 72 :loc_end 90} :loc_start 57 :loc_end 90}) :loc_start 39 :loc_end 91}) :loc_start 15 :loc_end 92} :alias "distFromDubaiInMeters" :loc_start 15 :loc_end 117})
    :from {CONTAINER :name "c" :loc_start 123 :loc_end 124} :loc_start 0 :loc_end 124}})
